prompt: Which are the 15 most popular courses by total enrollment?

inputData.question: Which are the 15 most popular courses by total enrollment?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Which are the 15 most popular courses by total enrollment?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Which are the 15 most popular courses by total enrollment?"},"startedAt":1771804097679,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"Count active enrollments per course (distinct students) by joining courses -> course_sections -> enrollments, then return the top 15 by total_enrollments with deterministic tie-breaker ordering.","sql":"WITH course_enroll_counts AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS course_id,
    c.code AS course_code,
    c.name AS course_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT e.student_id) AS total_enrollments
  FROM public.courses AS c
  JOIN public.course_sections AS cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
  JOIN public.enrollments AS e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  WHERE e.is_active = true
  GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
)
SELECT
  course_id,
  course_code,
  course_name,
  total_enrollments
FROM course_enroll_counts
ORDER BY total_enrollments DESC, course_code ASC
LIMIT 15;","assumptions":["Total enrollment counts active enrollments only (enrollments.is_active = true).","Popularity is measured as distinct students per course (COUNT(DISTINCT student_id)).","Tie-breaker ordering uses course_code ascending for deterministic results."]},"endedAt":1771804131651},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"WITH course_enroll_counts AS (

LIMIT 15;"},"startedAt":1771804131656,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"WITH course_enroll_counts AS (

resultRaw.sql:
WITH course_enroll_counts AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS course_id,
    c.code AS course_code,
    c.name AS course_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT e.student_id) AS total_enrollments
  FROM public.courses AS c
  JOIN public.course_sections AS cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
  JOIN public.enrollments AS e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  WHERE e.is_active = true
  GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
)
SELECT
  course_id,
  course_code,
  course_name,
  total_enrollments
FROM course_enroll_counts
ORDER BY total_enrollments DESC, course_code ASC
LIMIT 15;

result.sql:
WITH course_enroll_counts AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS course_id,
    c.code AS course_code,
    c.name AS course_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT e.student_id) AS total_enrollments
  FROM public.courses AS c
  JOIN public.course_sections AS cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
  JOIN public.enrollments AS e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  WHERE e.is_active = true
  GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
)
SELECT
  course_id,
  course_code,
  course_name,
  total_enrollments
FROM course_enroll_counts
ORDER BY total_enrollments DESC, course_code ASC
LIMIT 15;
